---
title: "NWSL Official Kickoff Times, TV Schedules, and Streaming Locations"
---

**Saturday, March 14**

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Boston | NJ/NY | 12:30/**12:37 PM ET** | ABC, ESPN app, Disney+ |
| Kansas City |Utah| 4:00/**4:07 PM ET** | ION
| Bay | Denver| 6:30/**6:37 PM ET** | ION
| North Carolina | Louisville | 7:00/**7:07 PM ET** | NWSL+
| San Diego| Houston| 8:45/**8:52 PM ET**|ION

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}
